executives.name: Satya Nadella
executives.background: Satya Nadella is Chairman and Chief Executive Officer of Microsoft. Before being named CEO in February 2014, Nadella held leadership roles in both enterprise and consumer businesses across the company. Joining Microsoft in 1992, he quickly became known as a leader who could span a breadth of technologies and businesses to transform some of Microsoft’s biggest product offerings.

executives.name: Amy Hood
executives.background: Amy Hood is Microsoft’s executive vice president and chief financial officer. She is responsible for leading the company’s worldwide finance organization, including acquisitions, treasury activities, tax planning, accounting and reporting, and internal audit and investor relations.

tenure_dates.title: Executive Vice President and Chief Financial Officer

executives.name: Bradford Smith
executives.background: Brad Smith is Microsoft’s vice chair and president. He leads a team of more than 1,500 business, legal and corporate affairs professionals located in 54 countries and operating in more than 120 nations.

executives.name: Judson Althoff
executives.background: Judson Althoff is executive vice president and chief commercial officer at Microsoft. He is responsible for the sales strategy, execution and revenue growth of the company’s commercial business, which spans enterprise, public sector, small and medium businesses, services, and developer and partner communities.

tenure_dates.title: Executive Vice President and Chief Commercial Officer

executives.name: Christopher Capossela
executives.background: Chris Capossela is executive vice president and chief marketing officer at Microsoft. He leads the company’s worldwide marketing and consumer business, which includes advertising, brand, communications, research as well as Microsoft’s retail stores.

tenure_dates.title: Executive Vice President and Chief Marketing Officer

board_of_directors.name: Satya Nadella
board_of_directors.background: Chairman and CEO of Microsoft Corporation.

board_of_directors.name: Sandra Peterson
board_of_directors.background: Operating Partner at Clayton, Dubilier & Rice. Former Group Worldwide Chairman of Johnson & Johnson.

board_of_directors.name: Reid Hoffman
board_of_directors.background: Partner at Greylock Partners. Co-founder of LinkedIn.

board_of_directors.name: Hugh Johnston
board_of_directors.background: Senior Executive Vice President and Chief Financial Officer of The Walt Disney Company. Former Vice Chairman and CFO of PepsiCo.

board_of_directors.name: Teri List
board_of_directors.background: Former Executive Vice President and Chief Financial Officer of Gap Inc.

board_of_directors.name: Penny Pritzker
board_of_directors.background: Founder and Chairman of PSP Partners. Former U.S. Secretary of Commerce.

board_of_directors.name: Carlos Rodriguez
board_of_directors.background: Executive Chair of ADP, Inc. Former CEO of ADP.

board_of_directors.name: Charles Scharf
board_of_directors.background: CEO and President of Wells Fargo & Company.

board_of_directors.name: John Stanton
board_of_directors.background: Chairman of Trilogy Search Partners. Former Chairman and CEO of Western Wireless.
